discovery.name: AR_BU
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT bu.bu_name AS BUNAME, bu.bu_id AS BUID, bu.primary_ledger_id AS LEDGERID FROM fun_all_business_units_v bu WHERE bu.primary_ledger_id IS NOT NULL AND bu.bu_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT t.org_id FROM ra_customer_trx_all t WHERE t.org_id IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY CASE WHEN bu.bu_name = 'US1 Business Unit' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, bu.bu_name) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: AR_BATCH_SOURCE
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT bs.name AS BSNAME, bs.batch_source_id AS BSID FROM ra_batch_sources_all bs WHERE bs.batch_source_type = 'FOREIGN' ORDER BY CASE WHEN bs.name = 'Receivables Import' THEN 0 WHEN bs.name LIKE 'External Source%' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, bs.name) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: AR_TRX_TYPE
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT ct.name AS TTNAME, ct.cust_trx_type_seq_id AS TTID FROM ra_cust_trx_types_all ct WHERE ct.type = 'INV' AND NVL(ct.end_date, SYSDATE+1) > SYSDATE ORDER BY CASE WHEN ct.name = 'Invoice' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, ct.name) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: AR_BILL_CUSTOMER
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT hca.account_number AS ACCTNUM, hp.party_name AS PARTY, su.location AS SITENUM FROM ra_customer_trx_all t JOIN hz_cust_accounts hca ON hca.cust_account_id = t.bill_to_customer_id JOIN hz_parties hp ON hp.party_id = hca.party_id JOIN hz_cust_site_uses_all su ON su.site_use_id = t.bill_to_site_use_id WHERE t.org_id = ${BU_ID} AND hca.status = 'A' AND su.status = 'A' AND su.location IS NOT NULL AND hca.account_number IS NOT NULL AND REGEXP_LIKE(hca.account_number, '^[0-9]+$') ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(hca.account_number)) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

base_read.sql: SELECT trx_number AS TRX_NUMBER, customer_trx_id AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID FROM ra_customer_trx_all WHERE trx_number LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-AR-%'

interface_read.sql: SELECT l.interface_line_attribute1 AS LINE_REF, l.interface_line_id AS IFACE_LINE_ID, (SELECT LISTAGG(NVL(e.message_text, e.invalid_value), '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e.message_text) FROM ra_interface_errors_all e WHERE e.interface_line_id = l.interface_line_id) AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM ra_interface_lines_all l WHERE l.interface_line_context = :PREFIX
